coverage_note: OI walls and max pain are derived from observed option chains. A missing symbol or field is unavailable, never zero.

method.call_wall: strike with highest observed call open interest
method.put_wall: strike with highest observed put open interest
method.max_pain: listed strike minimizing aggregate intrinsic payout weighted by observed open interest
method.hsi_chain: HKEX official daily report; prior OI = current OI - official OI change
method.premium_estimate: official settlement price × observed total volume × HKD 50 contract multiplier
